'''''Gatherer''-class transports''' were personnel carriers of [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil]] design which could carry about 300 troops each. Their ion drives were considered underpowered for assault craft. The ships' hullform was described as "puffed-wafer silhouettes."

The [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] used them in an attempted takeover of the [[Roche system]]. Intent on capturing the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] government, a [[Killik/Legends|Killik]]-controlled convoy of Gatherers attempted to land on the Verpine capital, [[Nickel One]] during the Killik/[[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] border war.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''
